name: tutorial-review-loop
title: Review Loop
description: Agent generates content, human reviews it. Approve advances to done; revise sends it back to the agent. Demonstrates agent steps, autonomyLevel, review verdicts, and the approve/revise loop pattern.

steps.name: Describe What to Write
steps.description: Describe the document you want the agent to draft.

params.name: topic
params.description: Topic or title of the document

params.name: instructions
params.description: Detailed instructions for the agent — tone, length, audience, key points

steps.name: Generate Draft
steps.description: Agent writes a draft based on the topic and instructions. On revise loops, incorporates reviewer feedback.

agent.prompt:
You are a professional writer. Draft a document based on the user's topic and instructions.

Read /output/input.json for context:
- steps['describe-task'].topic — the subject
- steps['describe-task'].instructions — detailed guidance
- steps['review-draft'] (if present) — previous reviewer feedback to address

## OUTPUT CONTRACT (MANDATORY)
You MUST: 1) Write result JSON to {output_directory}/result.json using bash. 2) Your FINAL message must be ONLY: {"output_file": "{output_directory}/result.json", "summary": "..."}

Result JSON shape: { "draft": "<the full document text>", "wordCount": <number> }

steps.name: Review Draft
steps.description: Review the agent's draft. Approve to finalize, or revise with feedback to send it back.

params.name: feedback
params.description: Feedback for the agent if revising — what to change, add, or remove
